title: Calculation sheet for the Grocery Rebate (issued July 5, 2023) – No longer available - Canada.ca
content:
## Calculation sheet for the Grocery Rebate (issued July 5, 2023 ) – No longer available
The information provided should reflect your family situation as of of January 1, 2023 . All amounts are approximate. Your Notice of Determination will show your actual entitlement.
